description: Detail Graph ready relations — resolution paths from project condition to construction detail through the manufacturer atlas
resolution_flow: Project Condition -> Manufacturer System -> Assembly Constraint Set -> Detail

relations.resolution_notes: Path is structurally complete but detail geometry requires manufacturer CAD source data. Assembly constraint parameters (adhesive rates, membrane thickness) remain scaffold until manufacturer TDS ingestion.
Path is structurally complete but fastener patterns and edge metal profiles require manufacturer FM approval data. Detail geometry deferred to CAD source.
Path is structurally complete but WRB integration details and through-wall flashing geometry require manufacturer installation guide data.
